name: etix-mcp
description: Etix event discovery for Claude — search events, venues & performers and fetch event details

tools.name: etix_search
tools.description: Search Etix events, venues, and performers by keyword

tools.name: etix_get_event
tools.description: Fetch an Etix event/performance's details by event id

tools.name: etix_get_venue
tools.description: Fetch an Etix venue and its upcoming events by venue id

tools.name: etix_find_location
tools.description: Resolve a city or postal code to coordinates for location-based browsing

tools.name: etix_healthcheck
tools.description: Verify the fetchproxy bridge end-to-end — no auth required
